about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Leading Manufacturer of LED Lighting Solutions
about.desc1: With over 15 years of experience in LED lighting manufacturing, we are dedicated to providing innovative, energy-efficient lighting solutions for global customers.
about.desc2: Our products serve a wide range of applications including commercial greenhouses, indoor farms, industrial warehouses, and retail spaces. We pride ourselves on rigorous quality control and continuous R&D investment.

quality.title: Quality First
quality.desc: Every product undergoes strict testing before shipment.

innovation.title: Innovation
